settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Everything in one place — your account and your workspace. Pick a section to manage it.
settings.profileDesc: How you show up across the app. Your avatar and name appear in the header, sidebar, and anywhere your teammates see you.
settings.teamMembersDesc: People with access to this account. Roles control what each teammate can do.
settings.loginSecurityDesc: Change your password and sign out of your devices. These keep your account safe.
settings.fieldsTagsDesc: Two ways to organize contacts: colour-coded tags for quick grouping, and custom fields for structured data.
settings.knowledgeContentPlaceholder: Paste the FAQ answer, policy text, or product details…
settings.reEmbed: Re-embed all documents (e.g. after adding an embeddings key)
settings.passwordDesc: Use at least 8 characters. You will stay signed in on this device after changing it.
settings.passwordsDoNotMatch: New password and confirmation do not match
settings.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
settings.noEmailForPassword: Cannot change password without a current email
settings.sessionsDesc: Sign out of every device where you're logged in — including this one. Useful if you lost a laptop or shared your password.
settings.signOutDesc: Every device logged into this account will be signed out and will need to log in again. You will be redirected to the login page.
settings.photoFormatHint: PNG, JPG, WebP, or GIF. Up to 2 MB.
settings.unsupportedImageType: Unsupported image type. Use PNG, JPG, WebP, or GIF.
settings.imageTooLarge: Image is too large. Maximum 2 MB.
settings.emailChangePending: Profile saved — check your email to confirm the address change
settings.emailConfirmationNote: A confirmation email will be sent to the new address. Both the current and new email need to confirm before the change takes effect.
settings.removeMemberDesc: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from the team? This action cannot be undone.
settings.copyFailed: Copy failed — select and copy manually
settings.inviteLinkWarning: Save this link now. We never store the plaintext link, so we cannot recover it later.
settings.generateOneTimeLink: Generate a one-time invite link that expires after being clicked.
settings.label: Label
settings.linkExpiresHint: The link will expire after the first click.
settings.labelTooLong: Label must be 80 characters or fewer
settings.serverError: Could not reach the server. Try again?
settings.invitesHint: Invites are generated as one-time links. Each link can only be clicked once to accept the invitation.
settings.templatesDesc: Create and manage WhatsApp-approved message templates for use in broadcasts and automations.
settings.createFirstTemplate: Create your first message template to get started.
settings.imageRequirements: Upload a JPG or PNG image. Max 5 MB. The link must be publicly accessible over HTTPS.
settings.bodyPlaceholder: e.g. Hello {var1}, your order {var2} is confirmed.
settings.variablesHint: Use {var1}, {var2} for variables (must be contiguous starting at {var1}).
settings.deleteTemplateConfirm: Delete the template "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
settings.authenticationNote: AUTHENTICATION templates have a fixed body defined by Meta. Only the header and buttons can be edited.
settings.imageFormatError: Header image must be a JPEG or PNG.
settings.syncTooltip: Pull approved templates from your Meta WhatsApp Business Account
settings.syncTruncated: Synced the first 2000 templates only — your account has more. Sync again to continue, or contact support if this persists.
settings.editSubmitted: Edit submitted — Meta typically reviews within 24 hours.
settings.submitSubmitted: Submitted to Meta — typical review time is 24 hours. Status updates automatically.
settings.imageTooLarge: Image is {size} MB — Meta's limit is 5 MB.
settings.editDescription: Save your changes to re-submit to Meta. Status will flip back to PENDING during review.
settings.createDescription: Build a template and submit it to Meta for approval. Once approved, you can use it in broadcasts and the inbox.
settings.nameFixedHint: Name is fixed once a template exists on Meta — create a new template to change it.
settings.nameHint: Lowercase letters, digits, and underscores only.
settings.languageFixedHint: Language is fixed once a template exists on Meta.
settings.languageHint: Must match the exact code on Meta — en_US and en are distinct.
settings.headerSamplePlaceholder: Sample value for {var} (required for Meta review)
settings.imageMediaHint: Upload a JPEG/PNG (≤5 MB, ≥800×418 px recommended) or paste a public HTTPS link — we upload it to Meta for review automatically.
settings.mediaLinkHint: Must be a publicly accessible HTTPS link. Meta fetches it once during review, so it needs to stay live for ~24 hrs.
settings.sampleValuesLabel: Sample values (Meta uses these to review your template)
settings.buttonsHint: Up to {max} buttons. QUICK_REPLY buttons must come before URL / phone / copy-code buttons.
settings.urlExamplePlaceholder: Example value for {var} (required when URL has a variable)
settings.deleteConfirmWithMeta: "{name}" will be deleted from Meta and from wacrm. Active broadcasts using this template will start failing on their next send. This can't be undone.
settings.deleteConfirmLocalOnly: "{name}" will be deleted from wacrm. It was never submitted to Meta, so no remote cleanup is needed.
settings.editTriggersRereview: Editing triggers Meta re-review — status flips to PENDING.
settings.editResubmitTooltip: Edit the template and resubmit to Meta for review.
settings.deleteFromMetaAndLocal: Delete template from Meta and locally
settings.tagsDesc: Colour-coded labels for grouping and filtering contacts.
settings.noTags: No tags yet — create your first one below.
settings.deleteTagConfirm: Delete the tag "{name}"? This removes it from all contacts and cannot be undone.
settings.customFieldsDesc: Extra contact fields (e.g. ZIP code, lead source). They appear on every contact and in the "Update Contact Field" automation action.
settings.apiKeysDesc: Create API keys to integrate external tools. Send the Authorization: Bearer header in each request.
settings.createFirstKey: Click New API key to create one.
settings.askAdminKey: Ask an admin to create one.
settings.copyKeyWarning: This is the only time the full key is shown. Copy and save it in a secure location.
settings.copyFailedManual: Copy failed — select and copy manually
settings.newKeyDialogDesc: Name it after the integration that will use it, and grant only the scopes it needs.
settings.noScopeHint: A key with no scopes can still call {endpoint} to verify it works.

properties.title: Property Catalog
properties.subtitle: Manage your real estate property listings.
properties.dragPhotosHere: Drag photos here or click to select

email.title: Email Manager
email.subtitle: Send and manage emails with templates and scheduling.
email.subject: Subject
email.templateFollowUpSubject: Following up on our property conversation
email.templateFollowUpContent:
Hi [name],

I hope you're doing well! I wanted to follow up on our recent conversation about the properties we discussed.

If you have any questions or would like to schedule a visit, I'm here to help.

Best regards,
email.templateNewPropertyContent:
Hi [name],

We have a new property that might be exactly what you're looking for!

📍 Location: [address]
🏠 Type: [type]
📐 Area: [area]
💰 Price: [price]

Would you like to schedule a visit? I'm available!

Best regards,
email.templateVisitConfirmationContent:
Hi [name],

I confirm our visit to the property as scheduled:

📅 Date: [date]
⏰ Time: [time]
📍 Location: [address]

Please confirm if the time still works for you.

Best regards,
email.templatePriceUpdateContent:
Hi [name],

I wanted to let you know that the property you were interested in has had a price update:

📍 [address]
💰 New price: [price]

I can still negotiate special conditions for you. How about a conversation?

Best regards,
email.templateContractExpiryContent:
Hi [name],

Your [contract_type] contract is approaching expiry on [expiry_date].

To ensure the continuity of your rights, please contact us so we can evaluate renewal options.

Best regards,
email.templateThankYouContent:
Hi [name],

I would like to thank you for your trust in our work. It was a pleasure helping you find the ideal property.

If you need anything in the future, I'm always here to help.

Best regards,
email.templateDocumentRequestContent:
Hi [name],

To proceed with the transaction, I need the following documents:

[documents]

Please send them as soon as possible so we can expedite the process.

Best regards,
email.templateBirthdayContent:
Hi [name],

How about starting this new year of life with the property of your dreams?

I have excellent options that may fit your current moment. Shall we talk?

Happy birthday!

Best regards,
email.aiPlaceholder: Describe what the email should contain...
email.aiFailed: Failed to generate email with AI
email.aiPromptRequired: Describe what you want in the email

pdf.title: UniPDF
pdf.subtitle: Merge PDFs and images into a single document with optional cover page.
pdf.dropZone: Click or drag PDFs and images
pdf.toastEnterTitle: Enter a title for the cover
pdf.cropHint: Drag the edges of the rectangle to crop the image to the desired proportion.

aiWriter.title: AI Writer
aiWriter.subtitle: Generate professional content with AI — emails, proposals, contracts, and more.
aiWriter.placeholderEmail: e.g., Send a follow-up email to a client about the project proposal...
aiWriter.placeholderProposal: e.g., Create a proposal for a website redesign project for a small business...
aiWriter.placeholderContract: e.g., Terms for a 6-month consulting agreement with monthly payments...
aiWriter.placeholderWhatsapp: e.g., Thank a customer for their purchase and ask for feedback...
aiWriter.placeholderCustom: Describe what you want to generate...
aiWriter.placeholderDefault: Your generated content will appear here

socialPosts.title: Social Posts
socialPosts.subtitle: Generate engaging content for your social media platforms with AI.
socialPosts.whatToPost: What do you want to post about?
socialPosts.inputPlaceholder: e.g., Promote our new summer sale with 30% off all products...
socialPosts.postWillAppear: Your social post will appear here
socialPosts.describePost: Describe what you want to post about
socialPosts.promptSocial: Create a {platform} post based on this: {input}. {guidelines} Write ONLY the post content, nothing else.
socialPosts.guidelinesFacebook: Write a Facebook post. Use a conversational tone, include relevant hashtags, and encourage engagement (likes, comments, shares). Keep it under 500 characters for optimal reach.
socialPosts.guidelinesInstagram: Write an Instagram caption. Start with a hook, use line breaks for readability, include 20-30 relevant hashtags at the end. Make it visually descriptive and engaging.
socialPosts.guidelinesX: Write a tweet for X (Twitter). Be concise, punchy, and use max 280 characters. Include 1-3 relevant hashtags. Make it retweetable.
socialPosts.guidelinesTiktok: Write a TikTok caption. Keep it short, trendy, and use hashtags. Include a call-to-action. Use emojis and informal language.
socialPosts.guidelinesLinkedin: Write a LinkedIn post. Be professional yet personable. Use short paragraphs, include a hook in the first line, and end with a question to drive engagement.
socialPosts.guidelinesWhatsapp: Write a WhatsApp message. Keep it friendly, concise, and conversational. Use emojis sparingly. Perfect for broadcast lists or status updates.

scanner.title: Document Scanner
scanner.subtitle: Scan documents with automatic perspective correction.
scanner.captureDescription: Take a photo of the document or upload an image
scanner.cameraError: Could not access the camera. Please check browser permissions.
scanner.invalidFile: Please select a valid image file.
scanner.cropDescription: Drag the corners to adjust the document area

bankExtractor.title: Bank Extractor
bankExtractor.subtitle: Upload bank statements (PDF/Image) — AI extracts transactions and generates a spreadsheet.
bankExtractor.headerDesc: Upload bank statements (PDF, JPG, PNG) — AI extracts credits and generates the spreadsheet automatically.
bankExtractor.rules3: Special rule: if the same amount appears as credit AND debit on the same day, the credit is discarded (reversal/transfer).
bankExtractor.rules4: Multiple files from the same period are automatically summed.
bankExtractor.name: Name
bankExtractor.spreadsheetEmptyDesc: Add statements and click Extract & Generate.
bankExtractor.onlySupported: Only PDF, JPG and PNG are supported. Other files were ignored.
bankExtractor.noTransactions: No transactions found in the files.

contactExtractor.title: Contact Extractor
contactExtractor.subtitle: Extract contacts from images, spreadsheets, and PDFs using AI.

broadcasts.title: Broadcasts
broadcasts.subtitle: Send bulk messages to your contacts using approved templates.
broadcasts.createFirst: Create your first broadcast to reach your contacts at scale.
broadcasts.newSubtitle: Create and send a broadcast message to your contacts.
broadcasts.draftNeedsName: Give the broadcast a name before saving a draft.
broadcasts.profileNotLinked: Your profile is not linked to an account.
broadcasts.chooseTemplateDesc: Select an approved message template for your broadcast.
broadcasts.createTemplateHint: Create a template using the button above.
broadcasts.selectAudienceDesc: Choose who will receive this broadcast.
broadcasts.allContactsDesc: Send to every contact in your database
broadcasts.customFieldDesc: Filter by a custom field value
broadcasts.uploadCsvDesc: Upload a list of phone numbers
broadcasts.noTagsFound: No tags found. Create tags in Settings.
broadcasts.noCustomFieldsDefined: No custom fields defined. Create one in Settings → Custom Fields.
broadcasts.selectAudienceTypeHint: Select an audience type to see the estimate.
broadcasts.personalizeMessageDesc: Map template variables to contact fields, custom fields, or static values.
broadcasts.mediaUrlHint: Public URL of the {type} sent as the message header. Used for every recipient in this broadcast.
broadcasts.mediaUrlRequired: A media URL is required to send this template.
broadcasts.noVariablesToPersonalize: This template has no variables to personalize.
broadcasts.unmappedWarning: Map every placeholder before continuing — still missing {keys}. Otherwise those placeholders will ship to Meta as empty strings.
broadcasts.reviewAndSendDesc: Name your broadcast, review the details, and send.
broadcasts.confirmBroadcastDesc: You are about to send this broadcast to {count} contacts using the {template} template. This action cannot be undone.
broadcasts.cannotDeleteWhileSending: Cannot delete while a broadcast is actively sending

automations.title: Automations
automations.subtitle: Build workflows that react to WhatsApp® events automatically.
automations.pickTemplateOrScratch: Pick a template above or create one from scratch.
automations.deleteDescription: This permanently removes {name} and its execution history. This cannot be undone.
automations.triggerFirstMessageHint: First time this contact ever messages you
automations.triggerNewContactHint: When a contact is auto-created from an incoming message
automations.triggerTagAddedHint: When a tag is added to a contact
automations.tplWelcomeDesc: Auto-reply to first-time contacts with a greeting.
automations.tplOutOfOfficeDesc: Auto-reply during off-hours so nobody is left waiting.
automations.tplLeadQualifierDesc: Ask qualification questions to filter inbound leads.
automations.tplFollowUpDesc: Send a nudge if a contact has not replied within 24 hours.
automations.closeNoConfig: Sets the conversation status to "closed". No configuration needed.
automations.keywordsPlaceholder: e.g. pricing, demo request, talk to sales

flows.title: Flows
flows.subtitle: Build branching, button-driven WhatsApp conversations. Useful for menus, FAQs, and triage before a human steps in.
flows.createFirstFlow: Build your first conversation — a welcome menu, an order lookup, an FAQ bot. Customers tap buttons; the bot routes them to the right answer (or the right agent).
flows.startFromTemplate: Start from a template or build from scratch.
flows.tplWelcomeMenuDesc: Greet customers who type a keyword and route them to the right agent based on whether they're new or existing.
flows.tplFaqBotDesc: Answer common questions automatically. Customer picks a topic from a list; the bot replies with the answer and ends.
flows.tplLeadCaptureDesc: Greet first-time inbounds, capture name + email + company, then hand off to sales with the answers in the note.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Conversations other teammates assign to you show up here.
notifications.assignAlert: You'll see an alert here when someone assigns you a conversation.

agents.title: AI Agents
agents.subtitle: Your bring-your-own-key AI agent — set it up, then test it in the playground before it replies to customers in the inbox.
agents.playgroundSubtitle: — test replies as if you were a customer
agents.playgroundEmpty: Send a message to see how your agent would reply.
agents.playgroundEmptyHint: It uses your knowledge base and behaves exactly like the auto-reply bot — including handoff.
agents.playgroundNotSetUp: Not set up yet? Go to Setup
agents.playgroundHandoff: Would hand off to a human here
agents.playgroundErrorNotConfigured: No agent configured yet — finish Setup first.

aiConfig.title: Agent setup
aiConfig.description: Bring your own OpenAI or Anthropic key. wacrm calls the provider directly with your key — no per-seat AI fees, and your data stays yours. This powers AI-drafted replies in the inbox, the auto-reply bot, and the Playground.
aiConfig.adminOnly: Only admins and owners can change the AI configuration.
aiConfig.providerKeyDesc: Your key is encrypted at rest (AES-256-GCM) and never shown again after saving.
aiConfig.modelSearchPlaceholder: Search or type a model name…
aiConfig.clickTestKey: Select a model from the list.
aiConfig.embeddingsKeyHint: An OpenAI key used only to embed your knowledge base (text-embedding-3-small)
aiConfig.embeddingsKeyHintSame: — can be the same key as above
aiConfig.embeddingsKeyHintBlank: . Leave blank to use keyword search instead. Clear it to turn semantic search off.
aiConfig.behaviourDesc: Tell the assistant about your business — products, tone, what it may and may not promise. This context feeds both drafts and auto-replies.
aiConfig.businessContextPlaceholder: e.g. We are Acme, a coffee-equipment store. Be warm and concise. Never quote prices or delivery dates — hand off to a human for those.
aiConfig.enableAiDesc: Master switch. Turns on the "Draft with AI" button in the inbox.
aiConfig.autoReplyDesc: The bot answers new inbound messages automatically (only when no flow handles them and no agent is assigned). Hands off to a human when it can't help.
aiConfig.maxRepliesDesc: After this many bot replies in one thread, the bot goes quiet.
aiConfig.kbDesc: Add FAQs, policies, or product details. The assistant retrieves the relevant pieces when drafting and auto-replying, so it can answer instead of handing off.
aiConfig.kbSemanticOn: Semantic search is on (embeddings key set).
aiConfig.kbSemanticOff: Using keyword search — add an embeddings key above for semantic search.
aiConfig.kbReindexTooltip: Re-embed all documents (e.g. after adding an embeddings key)
aiConfig.kbContentPlaceholder: Paste the FAQ answer, policy text, or product details…

whatsappConfig.title: WhatsApp connection
whatsappConfig.description: Connect your Meta WhatsApp Business API. Credentials, webhook, and setup steps all live here.
whatsappConfig.credentialsValidDesc: Your access token authenticates with Meta. See Registration status below for whether webhooks are actually wired.
whatsappConfig.notConnectedDesc: Configure your Meta API credentials below to connect your WhatsApp Business account.
whatsappConfig.registered: Registered — Meta will deliver events to wacrm
whatsappConfig.notRegistered: Not registered — Meta will not deliver events
whatsappConfig.registeredDescVerify: Click Verify with Meta if events stop arriving.
whatsappConfig.notRegisteredErrorHint: Enter (or correct) the 2-step PIN below and click Save Configuration to retry.
whatsappConfig.notRegisteredHint: This number was saved before registration tracking existed, or registration was skipped. Enter the 2-step PIN below and click Save Configuration to subscribe it.
whatsappConfig.verifiedOk: Number is fully wired — Meta is delivering events.
whatsappConfig.verifiedFail: Number is not fully registered. See the checks below for which step failed.
whatsappConfig.verifiedError: Could not reach the verification endpoint.
whatsappConfig.resetConfirm: This will delete the current WhatsApp config so you can re-enter it. Continue?
whatsappConfig.resetSuccess: Configuration cleared. You can now re-enter your credentials.
whatsappConfig.apiCredentialsDesc: Enter your Meta WhatsApp Business API credentials.
whatsappConfig.tokenHidden: Token is hidden for security. Re-enter it to update configuration.
whatsappConfig.webhookVerifyHint: A custom string you create. Must match the token you set in Meta webhook settings.
whatsappConfig.pinHint: Needed only to wire inbound messages for a production number.
whatsappConfig.webhookConfigDesc: Use this URL as your webhook callback in the Meta App Dashboard.
whatsappConfig.tokenRequired: Access Token is required for initial setup
whatsappConfig.tokenReenter: Please re-enter the Access Token to save changes
whatsappConfig.configSaved: WhatsApp connected. Events will start flowing within a minute.
whatsappConfig.configSavedSkipped: Credentials saved and verified. Inbound registration was skipped (no PIN) — see Registration status below.
whatsappConfig.configSavedMetaError: Saved, but Meta couldn't register the number: {error}
whatsappConfig.testFailedNetwork: Connection test failed. Check network and try again.
whatsappConfig.setupInstructionsDesc: Follow these steps to connect your WhatsApp Business API.
setupStep1Items: Fill in app details and create
whatsappConfig.setupStep1Item4: Fill in app details and create
setupStep2Items: In your app dashboard, click "Add Product"
Follow the setup wizard to link your business
whatsappConfig.setupStep2Item1: In your app dashboard, click "Add Product"
whatsappConfig.setupStep2Item3: Follow the setup wizard to link your business
setupStep3Items: Copy your WhatsApp Business Account ID
Generate a Permanent Access Token from Business Settings > System Users
whatsappConfig.setupStep3Item3: Copy your WhatsApp Business Account ID
whatsappConfig.setupStep3Item4: Generate a Permanent Access Token from Business Settings > System Users
setupStep4Items: Paste the Webhook Callback URL from above
Enter the same Verify Token you set here
whatsappConfig.setupStep4Item3: Paste the Webhook Callback URL from above
whatsappConfig.setupStep4Item4: Enter the same Verify Token you set here

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Set the mode and accent colour used across the app. Saved to this device — try it, it changes live.

dealsSettings.description: The currency used for new deals and for pipeline and dashboard totals.
dealsSettings.defaultCurrencyDesc: New deals default to this currency, and pipeline and dashboard totals are shown in it. Existing deals keep the currency they were saved with.
dealsSettings.adminOnly: Only account admins can change the default currency.

inbox.sessionExpired: 24-hour session expired. Use a template to re-engage.
